rounds.sourceText: Begin with a sliding loop.
rounds.title: Begin with a sliding loop.

validationIssues.message: actionTag must be camelCase letters or digits (got sliding loop).

rounds.sourceText: With CC1, ch 3, 2 dc in loop, ch 2, * 3 dc in loop, ch 2; rep from * twice more, join with sl st in top of beginning ch 3. Break CC1.
rounds.title: Rnd 1

warnings.message: Expected 15 produced stitches, but expanded to 11.
warnings.sourceText: With CC1, ch 3, 2 dc in loop, ch 2, * 3 dc in loop, ch 2; rep from * twice more, join with sl st in top of beginning ch 3. Break CC1.

actions.instruction: Join CC2 in any ch-2 sp.

rounds.sourceText: Join CC2 in any ch-2 sp. Ch 3, 2 dc in same ch-2 sp, ch 2, 3 dc in same ch-2 sp, ch 1, * [3 dc, ch 2, 3 dc] in next ch-2 sp, ch 1; rep from * twice more, join with sl st in top of beginning ch 3. Break CC2.
rounds.title: Rnd 2

actions.instruction: Join CC1 in any ch-2 sp.

rounds.sourceText: Join CC1 in any ch-2 sp. Ch 3, 2 dc in same ch-2 sp, ch 2, 3 dc in same ch-2 sp, ch 1, 3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1, * [3 dc, ch 2, 3 dc] in next ch-2 sp, ch 1, 3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1; rep from * twice more, join with sl st in top of beginning ch 3. Break CC1.
rounds.title: Rnd 3

rounds.sourceText: Join CC3 in any ch-2 sp. Ch 3, 2 dc in same ch-2 sp, ch 2, 3 dc in same ch-2 sp, ch 1, [3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1] twice, * [3 dc, ch 2, 3 dc] in next ch-2 sp, ch 1, [3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1] twice; rep from * twice more, join with sl st in top of beginning ch 3. Break CC3.
rounds.title: Rnd 4

validationIssues.message: actionTag must be camelCase letters or digits (got sl st).
validationIssues.sourceText: join with sl st in top of beginning ch 3.

rounds.sourceText: Join CC2 in any ch-2 sp. Ch 3, 2 dc in same ch-2 sp, ch 2, 3 dc in same ch-2 sp, ch 1, [3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1] 3 times, * [3 dc, ch 2, 3 dc] in next ch-2 sp, ch 1, [3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1] 3 times; rep from * twice more, join with sl st in top of beginning ch 3. Break CC2.
rounds.title: Rnd 5

validationIssues.message: actionTag must be camelCase letters or digits (got sl st).
validationIssues.sourceText: join with sl st in top of beginning ch 3

rounds.sourceText: Weave in ends.
rounds.title: Weave in ends.

actions.instruction: Form a loop of yarn around your fingers, with the end attached to the ball on the right and the tail on the left. Insert hook into the loop under both pieces of yarn and draw up a loop onto hook. (This does not count as your first stitch.) Work first row into the original loop. Pull up the yarn tail after your first row is complete to close the loop.

rounds.sourceText: Begin with a sliding loop.
rounds.title: Begin with a sliding loop.

rounds.sourceText: With CC1, ch 4 (counts as dc + ch 1 throughout), 3 dc in loop, ch 2, 3 dc in loop, ch 1, dc in loop. Break CC1.
rounds.title: Row 1

actions.instruction: Join CC2 in first ch-1 sp.

rounds.sourceText: With RS still facing, join CC2 in first ch-1 sp. Ch 4, 3 dc in same ch-1 sp, ch 1, [3 dc, ch 2, 3 dc] in next ch-2 sp, ch 1, [3 dc, ch 1, dc] in last ch-1 sp. Break CC2.
rounds.title: Row 2

actions.instruction: Join CC1 in first ch-1 sp.

rounds.sourceText: With RS still facing, join CC1 in first ch-1 sp. Ch 4, 3 dc in same ch-1 sp, ch 1, 3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1, [3 dc, ch 2, 3 dc] in next ch-2 sp, ch 1, 3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1, [3 dc, ch 1, dc] in last ch-1 sp. Break CC1.
rounds.title: Rnd 3

actions.instruction: With RS still facing, join CC3 in first ch-1 sp.

rounds.sourceText: With RS still facing, join CC3 in first ch-1 sp. Ch 4, 3 dc in same ch-1 sp, ch 1, [3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1] twice, [3 dc, ch 2, 3 dc] in next ch-2 sp, ch 1, [3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1] twice, [3 dc, ch 1, dc] in last ch-1 sp. Break CC3.
rounds.title: Rnd 4

actions.instruction: With RS still facing, join CC2 in first ch-1 sp.

rounds.sourceText: With RS still facing, join CC2 in first ch-1 sp. Ch 4, 3 dc in same ch-1 sp, ch 1, [3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1] 3 times, [3 dc, ch 2, 3 dc] in next ch-2 sp, ch 1, [3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1] 3 times, [3 dc, ch 1, dc] in last ch-1 sp. Break CC2.
rounds.title: Rnd 5

rounds.sourceText: Weave in ends.
rounds.title: Weave in ends.

rounds.sourceText: Make 2.
rounds.title: Make 2

actions.instruction: Form a loop of yarn around your fingers, with the end attached to the ball on the right and the tail on the left. Insert hook into the loop under both pieces of yarn and draw up a loop onto hook. (This does not count as your first stitch.) Work first row into the original loop. Pull up the yarn tail after your first row is complete to close the loop.

rounds.sourceText: Begin with a sliding loop.
rounds.title: Begin with a sliding loop.

rounds.sourceText: With CC1, ch 4 (counts as dc + ch 1 throughout), 3 dc in loop, ch 1, dc in loop. Break CC1.
rounds.title: Row 1

actions.instruction: Join CC2 in first ch-1 sp.

rounds.sourceText: With RS still facing, join CC2 in first ch-1 sp. Ch 4, 3 dc in same ch-1 sp, ch 1, [3 dc, ch 1, dc] in last ch-1 sp. Break CC2.
rounds.title: Row 2

actions.instruction: Join CC1 in first ch-1 sp.

rounds.sourceText: With RS still facing, join CC1 in first ch-1 sp. Ch 4, 3 dc in same ch-1 sp, ch 1, 3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1, [3 dc, ch 1, dc] in last ch-1 sp. Break CC1.
rounds.title: Rnd 3

actions.instruction: Join CC3 in first ch-1 sp.

rounds.sourceText: With RS still facing, join CC3 in first ch-1 sp. Ch 4, 3 dc in same ch-1 sp, ch 1, [3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1] twice, [3 dc, ch 1, dc] in last ch-1 sp. Break CC3.
rounds.title: Rnd 4

rounds.sourceText: With RS still facing, join CC2 in first ch-1 sp. Ch 4, 3 dc in same ch-1 sp, ch 1, [3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 1] 3 times, [3 dc, ch 1, dc] in last ch-1 sp. Break CC2.
rounds.title: Rnd 5
